panels.title: Version Deltas — Did Learning Improve Outcomes?

targets.rawSql: SELECT from_version, to_version, metric_name, ROUND(from_value::numeric, 3) AS from_val, ROUND(to_value::numeric, 3) AS to_val, ROUND(delta::numeric, 3) AS delta, CASE WHEN improvement THEN '✓' ELSE '✗' END AS improved FROM learning_version_deltas WHERE repository = '$repository' ORDER BY to_version DESC, metric_name
SELECT 'v' || learning_version AS version, accepted_finding_rate FROM evaluation_snapshots WHERE repository = '$repository' ORDER BY learning_version
SELECT 'v' || learning_version AS version, false_positive_rate FROM evaluation_snapshots WHERE repository = '$repository' ORDER BY learning_version
